slides.heading: Ohayou
slides.content: Say 'Ohayou' in the morning. With friends, just 'Ohayou'. To teachers, use 'Ohayou Gozaimasu'.

slides.heading: Konnichiwa
slides.content: This is used from late morning until sunset. It is the most versatile greeting.

slides.heading: Konbanwa
slides.content: Once the sun goes down, switch to 'Konbanwa' for 'Good evening'.

slides.heading: Sumimasen
slides.content: This means 'Excuse me'. Use it to get a waiter's attention or if you bump into someone.

slides.heading: Arigatou
slides.content: Always say 'Arigatou' to show thanks. For extra politeness, add 'Gozaimasu'.
